prompt.name: S37.1 -- cost_usd + SQLite 持久化

before_state.file: RuntimeObservability 有 cache hit/miss tokens 但无真实成本计算

after_state.file: cost_usd 计算属性基于 DeepSeek 定价；dashboard_aggregator.py 有 SQLite 全量持久化 + 90 天自动清理

modify.add: cost_usd 计算属性：cache_hit=$0.07/M, cache_miss=$0.27/M, output=$1.10/M

prompt.go_gate: cost_usd 计算正确，SQLite 持久化 + 清理就绪
